---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for the project
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
Clear description of the pain point. Ex: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What should happen, and why does it fit this project?

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Other approaches you've tried or thought about.

**Which area does this affect?**
- [ ] Pipeline / retrieval
- [ ] LLM / generation
- [ ] Evaluation
- [ ] Dashboard / UI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI
- [ ] New sector / company

**Additional context**
Links, screenshots, examples from other projects.
